title: Sticky Egyptian Chicken Stew
description: A savory, gooey chicken stew with caramelized pomegranate molasses and honey, perfect for a date night Egyptianstyle dinner.

ingredients.name: mixed spice blend (cumin, coriander, smoked paprika, cayenne)

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C) and lightly oil a baking dish.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium‑high heat. Sear chicken thighs skin‑side down until golden, about 4‑5 minutes; flip and sear other side 3‑4 minutes. Transfer to baking dish.
Add diced onion and minced garlic to the skillet; sauté until softened, about 2‑3 minutes.
Stir in the mixed spice blend and cook for 1 minute to release aromas.
Pour in chicken broth, pomegranate molasses, honey, and tamarind paste; bring to a gentle simmer.
Return the seared chicken to the skillet, spooning some sauce over each piece.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 25‑30 minutes, or until the chicken reaches 165°F internal temperature.
Remove from oven, let rest 5 minutes. Stir in lemon juice and season with salt & pepper to taste.
Serve hot, spooning the glossy, caramelized sauce over the chicken.
